titleStmt.title: SII 9.232: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 232. (A.R. No. 337 of 1920.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE TANK-BUND OF THE VILLAGE UBACHERLA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 10th year of the Chālukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva (ruling from Kalyāṇa), Rākshasa, Jyēshṭha, śu. 3, Ādivāra, corresponding to A.D. 1135, May 27 Friday, not Sunday, as stated. The Mahāpradhāna Sēnādhipati Sandhivigrahi Barmadēvayya, the Hergaḍe Guttiya-Daṇḍanāyaka Sambudēva, Sāvāsi Ānandabhaṭṭa of Pāḷeya, Sairājabhaṭṭa, Sōnubhaṭṭa, the Mahāpradhāna and Daṇḍānayaka Kāḷimayya, Nāyaka Rēcharasa, Rāmadēva-Nāyaka, Malleya-Nāyaka Bācharasa and Dāsimarasa together with Kūchi-Seṭṭi, made a grant, on account of Uttarāyaṇa, of some land and an oil mill for the service of the gods Jakkēśvaradēva and Kēśavadēva. Kētumalla-Seṭṭi, Malliya-Seṭṭi, Pōlli-Seṭṭi and Dēsimanta-Manavāḷa made a gift of 500 leaves per load of betle leaves, for the service of the god Jakkēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīva
llabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatu sarvvajñacakravartti bhūlōkama
lladēvaru kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmopajī
vi svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dhānanantaṟpurādhyakṣa karituragasāhaṇi verggaḍe
śrīkaraṇaṁ hērisandhivigrahi pasāyitaṁ sēnādhipa
ti maneverggaḍe haḍapavaḷa daṇḍanāyakaṁ barmmadēvayyaṁ
gaḷ herggaḍe guttiya daṇḍanāyakaṁ saṁbudēvanuṁ pāḷeya
da sāvāsi Ānandabhaṭṭanuṁ sairājabhaṭṭanuṁ sōnubhaṭṭanu
mahāpradhāna kaḍitaverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ kāḷima
yyaṁgaḷu nāyakaṁ rēcarasanu rāmadēvanāyakanu ma
lleyanāyakanuṁ rājādhyakṣa bācarasanu dāsama
rasanu(ṁ)vintinibaruvirddu śrīmaccāḷukyabhūlōka
mallavarṣa 10 neya rākṣasasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa suddha 3
Ādivāra . Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtinimityavāgi svasti
śrīmanumahānābhyavaiśyakuḷatiḷaka Āytase
ṭṭiya suputra gōtrapavitra dūsalakuḷati
ḷakaṁ Uppuṁgeṟeya prabhu kūciseṭṭiyaru śrī
madu jakkēśvaradēvarggaṁ śrīkēsavadēvarggaṁgabhōgakkaṁ
pūjepunaskāranivēdyakkaṁ dhārāpūrvvakamāḍi mādi
rājaṁge biṭṭa keyi mūḍaṇa hola mattaru 12 keṟeya
keḷege gadde bīja khaṇḍuga 2 gāṇa Ondu yi(ṁ)ntī dharmma
va pratipāḷisidavaru gaṁgevāraṇāsiyalu

sāyirbbaru brāhmaṇarige sāyi
ra kavileyaṁ dānaṁ māḍida phalavintī
dharmmakkanyāyamaṁ cintisi kiḍisida
vargge yā brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavile
yma(ṁ)naḷida pātakavakku . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa(ṁ)sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . svasti śrījakkē
svaradēvarge kētumallaśeṭṭiyuṁ ma
llayaseṭṭiyuṁ pōliseṭṭiyuṁ
dēsimanta manavāḷaru Intiniba
rumiḷdu hēṟinalu Ainū
releyaṁ biṭharu . svasti .
Digital edition of SII 9.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
